sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
The player moved right. The animation shows "top-left (20,14) 5x11", which means the player moved from col 14 to col 24 (14 + 10 = 24). So the player moved 6 columns to the right.
Let me check the current player position.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check the player's new position
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] >= 20:
        print(f"Player: pixels={n['pixels']}")
        print(f"Boundary: {n['boundary']}")
        rows = sorted(set([p[0] for p in n['boundary']]))
        cols = sorted(set([p[1] for p in n['boundary']]))
        print(f"Row range: {rows[0]}-{rows[-1]}, Col range: {cols[0]}-{cols[-1]}")
        break
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
